text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's finally time for our practice match with Team
Zenith!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The team gets into a huddle and keeps their gaze
on the ground as they get ready.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Today's the rematch we've been waiting for! Let's
leave 'em in our dust!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Happy Hoppers...

text_block_list.name: Team Members
text_block_list.text: Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Sunny Runners...

text_block_list.name: Team Members
text_block_list.text: Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Carrot Pudding...

text_block_list.name: Team Members
text_block_list.text: Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Blue Bloom...

text_block_list.name: Team Members
text_block_list.text: Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Team Carrot...

text_block_list.name: Team Members
text_block_list.text: Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: All righty! Now we're talking! C'mon, team!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But even as they finish their cheer, a certain
Umamusume is watching our team with an icy
gaze.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: Hmph... As if that's going to help anyone win.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
What's wrong, Little Cocon? You always seem to
have a bone to pick with them.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
That's because just seeing them acting all chummy
and excited ticks me off.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
While you've all been wasting your breath
chitchatting, we've been training ourselves
beyond our limits.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I'm going to let a bunch of lazy
losers like you beat us.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ngh! We know you've been doing some really
rigorous training...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But we've been doing our best to polish up our
own skills too!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I-I might not be much alone, but together, this
team is unstoppable!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, a white-hot race begins.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yeehaw! I won!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Did you see me out there?! I almost won that just
now!

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: Guts! Glory! And gumptiooon!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Today's fortune is... Just good! That's fine! I can
still win with that!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oof, I was so close! I knew I couldn't depend on
mere good fortune, but I sure learned a lot from
that race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With two losses and two victories, it's now time
for the final race—the long distance.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I need to win the next one, or we lose the whole
thing… I have to do this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower's hands are shaking as she stalls by
the stands.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Deep breaths, deep breaths... I can do this... I can
do this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Just as I'm about to say something encouraging...

text_block_list.name: Team Members
text_block_list.text: Wait a sec!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh! What are you all doing here?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The rest of the team come running up to Rice
Shower.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Look, Rice! That cloud over there looks like a big
ol' elephant!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower looks up, and her grim expression
softens when she spots the cloud in question.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Wow, it does! It's so big!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Right? Pretty awesome, huh? And doesn't it look
like it's holding its trunk up high and trumpeting?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
The elephant up there's watching over you, so
don't worry! You'll do great for sure! Three cheers
for Rice! Woo!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Urara...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Take this, Rice! It's a lucky charm for good races
that I got from a most wondrous shrine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Matikanefukukitaru hands her a small charm.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Wow...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Rice! You've got this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Finally, Taiki Shuttle steps forward and gives Rice
Shower a big hug.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Heh! Wasn't that a nice hug? Good hugs help ya
relax, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: So, how are you feelin'? Not too scared?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Well, to be honest... I am a little scared. But I'll be
okay because you're all here with me.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: You betcha! Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Show 'em your stuff, Rice. You'll ace this one,
trust me!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yeah... You're right.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rice Shower looks at each of them one by one.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: You're right! I promise I'll win this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower gives them a confident nod and
dashes off to the starting gate.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Grrr! Just give up already!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant… I'm not... going to lose!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two fly across the track, and Rice Shower
sticks close to Little Cocon.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
I'm not losing either! I won't be defeated by some
soft team that can just laugh about losing a race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As they reach the final corner, Little Cocon lets
out a burst of speed!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
She still has that much energy after running 3,000
meters?! Little Cocon's incredible!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Y-you can do this, Rice!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Run, Rice! Keep going!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: We're with you the whole way!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Raaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower draws upon her final energy reserves
and pushes herself even faster.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The pair speed toward the finish line...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And Little Cocon wins by a hair.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: Huff... Wheeze Dammit!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: We're not... just some soft team!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I feel so much more motivated when I'm with
them! They're the best team I could ever ask for!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: ...Good for you.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for the race today. It's made it clear
that there are aspects of my team that still need
improvement.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I believe this was an invigorating experience for
them as well. We'll see you in the Unity Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We may have lost, but the race showed us just
how much we've improved!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'm so sorry... I let you all down again...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Nuh-uh, you were darn great, Rice! That was some
fab runnin'!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Why, when you managed to catch up to Little
Cocon, my heart nearly burst with pride!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Just then, I hear a familiar voice nearby...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... So Ms. Kashimoto is still stuck in her ways... A
shame!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Hm?! Oho! Hello, you all!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I watched your race. You've all improved by leaps
and bounds! Truly commendable!
choice_data_list:
Director, there's something I wanted to talk to
you about...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I begin explaining what Ms. Kashimoto has been
trying to implement at the academy in the hopes
Director Akikawa will stop her, but...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Tazuna has already filled me in on the details. It
must have been a very trying time for you all!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
However, I have decided to wait and see how the
situation unfolds!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
As such, Ms. Kashimoto will remain in charge of
the academy for the time being. That is all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With this shocking announcement, Director
Akikawa strolls away with a leisurely gait.
